notice: Synthetic, privacy-safe issue text preserving manually audited evaluator relationship shapes; no source issue text or private tracker data.

issues.title: REF-101 parse dependency targets
issues.description: Implemented directed dependency target parsing and rejected self edges.
issues.acceptance_criteria: The stored target preserves direction.

issues.title: Harden dependency import validation
issues.description: Follow up REF-101 by validating malformed relationship payloads.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Malformed targets are reported without inventing edges.

issues.title: REF-202 stream formatter output
issues.description: Added streaming output for large reports.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Formatting does not buffer the complete report.

issues.title: Bound formatter memory
issues.description: Continue REF-202 by capping temporary formatting buffers.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Peak formatter memory remains bounded.

issues.title: REF-303 introduce layered configuration
issues.description: Create the layered configuration loader.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Repository values override user defaults.

issues.title: Migrate validation to layered configuration
issues.description: Build on REF-303 and move validation reads to the new loader.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Validation uses the same precedence rules.

issues.title: REF-404 repair cache checksum guard
issues.description: Reject cache payloads whose checksum does not match.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Corrupt vectors are never returned.

issues.title: Add checksum corruption regression
issues.description: Follow-up for REF-404 covering truncated cache payloads.
issues.acceptance_criteria: The repaired checksum invariant has a regression test.

issues.title: REF-505 add lint rule metadata
issues.description: Expose stable rule identifiers in diagnostics.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Diagnostics carry a stable rule identifier.

issues.title: Render rule metadata in JSON
issues.description: Depends on REF-505 and serializes its identifiers.
issues.acceptance_criteria: JSON output contains the stable rule identifier.

issues.title: REF-606 transfer index ownership
issues.description: Moved index lifecycle ownership into the workspace service.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Only the workspace service closes the index.

issues.title: Remove legacy index shutdown
issues.description: After REF-606, delete the caller-owned shutdown path.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Callers no longer close the workspace index.

issues.title: REF-707 classify parser failures
issues.description: Introduce failure categories for parser diagnostics.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Each parser failure has one category.

issues.title: Document parser failure categories
issues.description: Uses REF-707 categories in troubleshooting guidance.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Every public failure category is documented.

issues.title: REF-808 stabilize result pagination
issues.description: Defined the cursor contract for paginated results.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Cursors remain opaque and stable within a snapshot.

issues.title: Expose pagination cursor in CLI
issues.description: Follow up REF-808 by printing the next opaque cursor.
issues.acceptance_criteria: CLI users can resume the same snapshot.

issues.title: REF-909 plan migration guide
issues.description: Outline the migration phases and compatibility window.
issues.acceptance_criteria: The guide identifies every migration phase.

issues.title: Implement migration compatibility shim
issues.description: Related to REF-909 but implements the temporary runtime shim.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Old configuration remains readable during migration.

issues.title: REF-110 record queue latency
issues.description: Added queue latency observations around worker execution.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Worker latency is recorded once per job.

issues.title: Add queue latency dashboard
issues.description: Visualize the observations introduced by REF-110.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Operators can inspect latency percentiles.

issues.title: REF-121 isolate filesystem tests
issues.description: Provide an isolated filesystem test harness.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Tests cannot write into the source checkout.

issues.title: Port cache tests to isolated filesystem
issues.description: Uses the harness from REF-121 for cache tests.
issues.acceptance_criteria: Cache tests write only within the harness.

issues.title: Preserve typed dependency direction
issues.description: Keep incoming and outgoing dependency edges distinct.

issues.title: Preserve typed dependency direction
issues.description: Kept incoming and outgoing relationship edges distinct.

issues.title: Normalize CLI output paths
issues.description: Return normalized paths in machine-readable output.

issues.title: Normalize CLI output paths!
issues.description: Returned normalized paths in JSON output.

issues.title: Reject stale checkpoint state
issues.description: Fail when checkpoint state belongs to another workspace.

issues.title: REJECT STALE CHECKPOINT STATE
issues.description: Rejected checkpoints created for a different workspace.

issues.title: Build command arguments
issues.description: Construct subprocess argument vectors without shell interpolation.

issues.title: Open command palette
issues.description: Show a searchable keyboard action menu.

issues.title: Repair vector cache eviction
issues.description: Evict expired vector entries from local storage.

issues.title: Display cache dashboard
issues.description: Show browser cache totals to operators.

issues.title: Document service architecture
issues.description: Describe API service boundaries and ownership.

issues.title: Repair build architecture detection
issues.description: Select the correct processor target during compilation.

issues.title: Implement rule RUF101
issues.description: Flag redundant list conversions.

issues.title: Implement rule RUF202
issues.description: Flag invalid timeout configuration.

issues.title: Harden job lifecycle cleanup
issues.description: Release worker leases after jobs finish.

issues.title: Document component lifecycle
issues.description: Explain browser component mount and unmount events.
